answer: Incident ix-9r2-nexus-774 affected the boreal margin capture index on 2027-01-07, 2027-01-13, and 2027-01-22. The root cause was that the helios bridge wrote a misaligned quartz ledger epoch, pulling metadata from fm_src_gamma_51 instead of the correct stream_scan_zeta_09 via pipe_krypton_19b on asset.obsidian_reef_207. The remediation was to flush the quartz ledger epoch before helios bridge warmup, owned by team-mercury-delta. The signal family is sigfam_crimson_088 with validation marker vm-beryl-559-ok.

facts.remediation: flush quartz ledger epoch before helios bridge warmup
facts.root_cause: helios bridge wrote misaligned quartz ledger epoch
